import pandas as pd


def compute_discount(df):
    df["discount"] = df["price"].apply(lambda x: x * 0.1)
    return df


def classify_age(df):
    df["age_group"] = df["age"].apply(lambda x: "adult" if x >= 18 else "minor")
    return df


def compute_full_name(df):
    df["full_name"] = df.apply(lambda row: f"{row['first']} {row['last']}", axis=1)
    return df


def normalize_scores(df):
    df["normalized"] = df["score"].apply(lambda x: (x - df["score"].mean()) / df["score"].std())
    return df
